title: Cyclosorus paucipaleatus
taxonomy: Cyclosorus paucipaleatus is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae. This species belongs to the genus Cyclosorus, which is a group of ferns. The genus Cyclosorus is further classified under the order Polypodiales, a large and diverse order of ferns. Within the order Polypodiales, Cyclosorus paucipaleatus is also classified under the subclass Polypodiidae, a subclass of ferns that have leathery fronds. The species is also classified under the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns.

intro: Cyclosorus paucipaleatus, also known as the "few-spined cyclosorus," is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various diseases such as arthritis and certain types of cancer.
